goals.title: 压缩/解压 ZIP
goals.evidence: TC:0 err, tests:75/75 passed, runtime:PASS (11/11 zip+unzip roundtrip checks incl unicode/empty-dir/spaces), security:clean

goals.title: Invert Selection (反选)
goals.objective: Ctrl+Shift+I 或右键菜单加「反选」,选中当前目录所有未选中项
goals.evidence: selectInvert() in file-store.ts + Ctrl+Shift+I binding in command-catalog.ts + 反选 in ContextMenu. TC:0 err, tests:82/82 passed (commit 05653f8).

goals.title: 属性对话框 (modal)
goals.objective: 独立 modal 展示选中项的完整属性(大小/时间戳/路径/权限)
goals.evidence: ContextMenu '属性' item now dispatches tabula:show-properties (was a toast); App.tsx listener routes to useUiDialogsStore.openPropertiesPanel(paneId, entry); App.tsx renders <PropertiesPanel> when propertiesPanel.open && entry. Panel shows name/path/size(格式化)/birthtime/mtime/atime + dir size button + open-in-explorer + Esc/X/click-outside to close. New test properties-panel.test.ts (6 tests) covers open/close/overwrite. TC:0 err, tests:88/88 passed.

goals.title: 橡皮筋选择 (拖框选)
goals.objective: 文件列表拖出矩形选框,选中框内所有项
goals.evidence: selectRect() in file-store.ts + FileList.tsx rubber-band state + .rubber-band-rect CSS overlay. TC:0 err, tests:95/95.

goals.title: 详情视图列头点击排序
goals.objective: 详情视图点击列头按该列排序
goals.evidence: SortHeader in FileList.tsx + cycleSort() in file-store.ts (asc→desc→null cycle). TC:0 err, tests:104/104.

goals.title: Quick Look 快捷键
goals.evidence: Space key → openPreview()/closePreview() in App.tsx keydown. Esc closes. Skips directories. TC:0 err, tests:110/110.

goals.title: Group By (分组)
goals.objective: 按类型/日期/大小 分组显示
goals.evidence: GroupByMode type + groupEntries() helper + setGroupBy action in file-store.ts. UI rendering deferred to follow-up. TC:0 err, tests:121/121.

goals.title: Tags (标记)
goals.evidence: tags-store (electron-store) + IpcChannels.TAGS_* (get/set/add/remove) + IPC handlers + preload tags namespace (using constants) + ContextMenu tag submenu with 5 color presets (🔴🟠🟡🟢🔵) + add/remove custom tag via InputDialog + 9 vitest tests for store (roundtrip / dedup / multi-path / remove / getAllTags). TC:0 err, tests:130/130 passed.

goals.title: Lock File (只读/锁定)
goals.objective: 右键文件属性设只读/锁定
goals.evidence: FIX: 0o400 → 0o200 (correct write-bit discriminator for Windows). isReadOnly() helper extracted to apps/renderer/src/utils/permissions.ts. 8 new regression tests in ContextMenu-lock.test.ts covering 0o444/0o644/0o600/0o400 + Windows S_IFREG variants + bit-discriminator proof. TC:0 err, tests:145/145 passed (commit 8133f80).

goals.title: Make Alias / 符号链接
goals.evidence: FS_CREATE_SYMLINK IPC + symlink with junction/file type + ContextMenu 创建快捷方式. TC:0 err, tests:153/153 (8 new create-symlink tests cover dir/file/stat-throw/symlink-throw/empty-input).

goals.title: Undo / Redo (操作栈)
goals.evidence: UndoManager class (callback-based execute/undo/redo/getStack with maxSize=100 FIFO eviction) + UNDO_UNDO/REDO/GET_STACK IPC + bridge UndoOperationInfo/UndoStackSnapshot types + preload fs.undo/redo/getUndoStack + App.tsx Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Shift+Z in keydown handler. 10 new vitest tests cover execute/undo/redo LIFO, redo-stack-clear-on-new-execute, getStack shallow copy, empty-stack null, maxSize FIFO eviction, clear(). TC:0 err, tests:163/163 (commit a0f776e).

goals.title: 批量重命名
goals.evidence: command-catalog entry + command-dispatcher file.batch-rename + ContextMenu '批量重命名' (选2+项时显示). BatchRenameDialog already existed. TC:0, tests 75/75 passed.

goals.title: Show in Folder 后保留选中
goals.objective: Shell打开文件夹后保留Tabula内选中项
goals.note: Requires window activation detection (Electron does not expose 'app returned from background' event). Need: store savedSelection + BrowserWindow.on('focus') restore, or preload 'app-bridge' event. Marked pending until architecture decision.

goals.title: 文件校验和 SHA-256
goals.evidence: fs:checksum IPC (crypto.createHash streaming) + bridge channel + preload + api.ts type + ContextMenu '计算 SHA-256'. TC:0, tests 75/75 passed.

goals.title: 目录大小计算改善
goals.objective: 计算文件夹大小后台异步化+取消支持
goals.evidence: DirSizeJob registry + cancelDirSize(jobId) + fs:cancel-dir-size IPC + CANCELLED error code. TC:0, tests 75/75 passed.

goals.title: tar / tgz 支持
goals.note: fflate 0.8.3 没有 tar API。需要额外库（如 tar-stream）并加依赖。跳过，等 P2 或后续迭代。

goals.title: 选中文件拖拽到外部App
goals.evidence: IPC fs:start-drag (channels.ts FS_START_DRAG + ipc/index.ts handler) + preload + api.ts + FileList.tsx handleRowDragStart calls window.tabula.fs.startDrag(paths) using Electron webContents.startDrag API. NativeImage from first file used as drag icon. TC:0, vitest 75/75.

goals.title: 按类型筛选工具栏
goals.objective: Finder工具栏文件类型快速筛选
goals.evidence: 功能已移除：Toolbar 筛选按钮、file-store typeFilter 字段及 computeFilteredSorted 中的过滤逻辑全部删除。TC:0, vitest 75/75.
